displayName: Medical University of the Americas — Caribbean
shortDescription: 4-year MD · Basic science on Nevis · US & Canada clinical rotations

policyAlert.summary: Verify current tuition, intake dates, and admission requirements on www.mua.edu/ before quoting clients. Indian students: confirm NEET eligibility and NMC guidance separately.

alert.title: MD vs MBBS naming
alert.body: MUA awards a Doctor of Medicine (MD) — counsel Indian clients on FMGE/NExT pathway; do not describe as Indian-style MBBS without explaining licensing steps.

about.label: Description
about.value: Medical University of the Americas (MUA) offers Doctor of Medicine (MD). Five semesters clinical medicine at affiliated teaching hospitals in the United States and Canada.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Meet MUA admission requirements · English proficiency where required · Indian applicants: verify NEET eligibility with current NMC rules

about.label: Accreditation highlight
about.value: Accreditation by St Kitts & Nevis accreditation body — verify on mua.edu

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Medical University of the Americas (admissions) · Nevis immigration authorities for study permit / visa

about.label: After graduation
about.value: USMLE · NRMP residency match · FMGE/NExT for India practice · Verify licensing in target country

mbbs.regionLabel: Caribbean (Nevis, Federation of St Kitts & Nevis)
accreditation: Accreditation by St Kitts & Nevis accreditation body — verify on mua.edu
Listed in World Directory of Medical Schools (WDOMS) — verify current entry
US clinical affiliate approvals — verify current hospital list
mbbs.programDuration: 4 years (10 semesters): 5 basic science on Nevis + 5 clinical in US/Canada
mbbs.clinicalTrainingNotes: Five semesters clinical medicine at affiliated teaching hospitals in the United States and Canada.
mbbs.campusNotes: Basic sciences campus on the island of Nevis. Housing and student services published on mua.edu.

relatedPrograms.name: 4-Year MD Program
relatedPrograms.summary: Basic science on Nevis followed by US/Canada clinical rotations. Rolling admissions.

relatedPrograms.name: Pre-Medical Programs
relatedPrograms.summary: Gateway programmes for students needing pre-med preparation before MD entry.

familyOptions.spouseCanAccompany: Possible subject to Nevis dependant visa rules — verify current immigration policy before client commitment.
familyOptions.spouseWorkRights: Spouse work authorization varies by Nevis rules — do not promise employment without visa approval.
familyOptions.childrenCanAccompany: Case-by-case — verify dependant visa rules and schooling availability.
familyOptions.childrenNotes: Plan schooling and childcare before family relocation.
familyOptions.additionalFundsRequired: Additional living funds and health insurance for each dependant — verify with admissions.
familyOptions.visaRoute: Student visa/residence for principal applicant; dependants require separate permits per Nevis rules.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse work without visa approval
Verify all family immigration with official sources
Clinical years may require separate visa strategy (if applicable)

practicePathways.summary: Graduates of Medical University of the Americas must verify licensing pathways in India (FMGE/NExT), host country, and any international targets on official sources.

india.fmgeNext: Indian citizens with foreign medical degrees must qualify FMGE (transitioning to NExT) and meet NMC requirements before registration in India.
details: Verify institution status on NMC foreign medical institutions list before enrollment.
Degree pathway: Doctor of Medicine (MD) — set client expectations early vs Indian 5.5-year MBBS.
Internship/clinical hours must meet NMC criteria — verify with current NMC notifications.
Never guarantee FMGE/NExT pass or India registration.

hostCountry.summary: Basic science in Charlestown; verify local student immigration rules during campus years.
details: Maintain valid student status in Nevis during basic science semesters.
Clinical years primarily in the United States — separate US visa strategy required.

usCanada.summary: Graduates eligible for USMLE Step 1 & Step 2 CK; residency match via NRMP. Canadian elective sites may be available — verify on official graduate outcomes page.
details: Basic science on Charlestown → US clinical rotations → USMLE → NRMP Match.
MCAT may be required or strongly recommended — verify current admissions policy.
Residency placement statistics published on university site — quote published data only.

recognition.who: Verify World Directory of Medical Schools (WDOMS) listing and WFME recognition chain.
recognition.nmc: Counselors must verify current NMC eligible colleges list — status can change; check before each intake.

restrictions: Never guarantee licensure, residency match, or India registration
Verify NMC list at time of admission

documentChecklistSections.label: Admission documents
items: Official transcripts (10th, 12th, bachelor's / pre-med as required)
NEET scorecard (Indian applicants — if required under current NMC rules)
Passport copy — valid 6+ months beyond program

documentChecklistSections.label: Visa & immigration (Charlestown — basic science years)
items: Proof of tuition payment or financial guarantee

documentChecklistSections.label: US clinical years (additional)
items: US visa strategy documented (typically F-1 or as advised by university)
SEVIS / I-20 if applicable for US clinical portion
Health insurance for US clinical sites
Updated financial proof for US rotation city living costs

applicant.summary: During study in Nevis, students must maintain valid student immigration status. Paid employment rules vary — verify local regulations before advising clients to work.
details: Unauthorized work may violate visa/residence conditions.
University may offer limited on-campus roles — verify with student services.
US clinical years governed by US student visa rules.
restrictions: Never advise clients to work illegally to fund tuition

spouse.summary: Spouse/partner work rights depend on Nevis dependant visa conditions — verify before promising employment.
details: Plan finances assuming limited spouse income unless visa explicitly permits work.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse employment without visa approval

fullCostBreakdown.title: Full cost breakdown — Medical University of the Americas
fullCostBreakdown.disclaimer: Indicative structure for counselor discussions. Tuition changes each academic year — always quote from https://www.mua.edu/admissions/tuition-and-fees before client commitment.

totals.label: Indicative total program budget
totals.value: Calculate from official tuition + full program living costs
totals.notes: Use www.mua.edu tuition page; add 15% buffer for currency and fee increases.

eligibility.criterion: NEET qualified (Indian applicants — verify current NMC rule)
eligibility.note: Check NMC notification at admission year

redFlagsBanner: If client expects guaranteed licensure or residency without exams, reset expectations before taking fees.

redFlags.title: Family relocation without visa plan
redFlags.fix: Immigration counsel before promising family join

redFlags.title: Wrong degree naming
redFlags.description: Misrepresenting MD vs MBBS equivalency for India.
